nasb.text: The sons of Ladan, the sons of the Gershonites belonging to Ladan, namely, the Jehielites, were the heads of the fathers’ households, belonging to Ladan the Gershonite.

esv.text: The sons of Ladan, the sons of the Gershonites belonging to Ladan, the heads of the fathers’ houses belonging to Ladan the Gershonite: Jehieli.

cnv.text: 革順家族拉但的子孫中作首領的，有革順家族拉但的子孫耶希伊利。

ccb.text: 革顺族拉但的子孙中做族长的有耶希伊利。
